title: Verify existing implementation of notification system
description: The notification system described in this task has already been fully implemented. Verified: src/models/notification.ts (Notification types with severity levels info/warning/error, read/unread status), src/services/notifications.ts (CRUD operations + mark-as-read with payload integration), src/routes/notifications.ts (GET/POST API routes with auth), src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts (formatNotification, filterNotifications, getUnreadCount, sortBySeverity), and corresponding test files for both service and helpers. All modules have passing tests.
existing_patterns: src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts follows utility module pattern (single-function file with co-located tests)
src/services/notifications.ts uses service layer pattern with typed dependency interfaces
src/routes/notifications.ts uses withAuth wrapper and standard NextRequest/Response pattern
Tests use vitest with mockPayload pattern matching other service tests like grading.test.ts
